_comment: Background PAGE (background.page = background.html). The <script src="background.js"> at line 5 loads module-syntax JS but lacks type="module" (fail). The type="module" tag (ok.js, line 6), the classic script (classic.js, line 7), and the inline module <script> (line 8, out of scope) are not flagged. --checks-only isolates the new check.
